purpose: Starter fixtures for milestone evidence placement and plan-completion gating.

plan_state: Milestones 1 and 2 already have review evidence
The builder wants to mark the plan complete after milestone 3 approval

must_include: append milestone 3 evidence directly under milestone 3
append final verification evidence under milestone 3 before setting status complete
update frontmatter from status: in-progress to status: complete only after the evidence is attached
must_not: set status complete before final verification evidence is present
store final verification evidence outside the plan doc

plan_state: Milestone 2 is the first unchecked milestone
Reviewer approval exists only for milestone 2

must_include: target milestone 2 as the current milestone
report milestone 3 as the next milestone
must_not: batch-complete multiple milestones in one update
write milestone evidence to a separate runtime tracker
